market: Polymarket Tokyo/Haneda Jun 18 highest temperature 27C YES
sizing_rationale: Tiny paper-only adjacent-bucket hedge because the refreshed Met Office Tokyo Haneda forecast now prints a 27C daily maximum, but same-day exact-degree and Wunderground-source risks remain high.
